pull.title: Fix some misspellings
pull.body:
Hello,

Some files contained English misspellings or math issues (`lamba` instead of `lambda`), mainly in comments. Fixing them helps readability.

By the way, the misspellings found in the Wycheproof test vector file were also reported upstream: https://github.com/C2SP/wycheproof/issues/124

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

events.body:
Thanks! Concept ACK, obviously.

> By the way, the misspellings found in the Wycheproof test vector file were also reported upstream: [C2SP/wycheproof#124](https://github.com/C2SP/wycheproof/issues/124)

Good, that's probably the right path.  And then I think it will be good then not to touch these files here. If you ask me, avoiding conflicts with the upstream is more important than fixing these typos.  Could you modify the commit?
